title: camelina alyssum subsp. integerrima
intro: Camelina alyssum subsp. integerrima, also known as wholeflower gold-of-pleasure, is a subspecies of annual or biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of camelina alyssum subsp. integerrima include its potential to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into oils, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support overall well-being and to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
